title: Рекомендации Оперативно-аналитического центра при Президенте Республики Беларусь (TZI/cybersecurity compliance recommendations)
description: OAC (national cryptographic/cybersecurity authority) recommendations for state bodies and organisations on technical and cryptographic information protection and cybersecurity. General encryption/protocol guidance; surfaced under PQC queries but no confirmed explicit post-quantum reference (WebFetch failed twice; search context indicates general crypto, not PQC). EXCLUDED.

title: О проведении конкурса проектов государственной научно-технической программы «Кибербезопасность-2» (2026–2030)
description: OAC + State Committee for Science and Technology funding competition for the 2026-2030 state scientific-technical programme on information protection / cybersecurity ('Cybersecurity-2'). Domestic government R&D funding call, but does NOT explicitly name post-quantum/quantum-safe cryptography. EXCLUDED (no explicit PQC).

title: Конкурсный отбор проектов заданий государственной научно-технической программы «Кибербезопасность», 2021–2025 годы
description: OAC competition for the 2021-2025 'Cybersecurity' state scientific-technical programme. Domestic government cybersecurity R&D programme; no explicit post-quantum/quantum-resistant cryptography reference found. EXCLUDED (no explicit PQC).

title: Техническая и криптографическая защита информации (OAC activity page)
description: OAC overview of technical and cryptographic information-protection activity (licensing, certification, STB standards). National crypto authority but content concerns Belarus's own (STB 34.101 / Bel-T) cryptography, not post-quantum. EXCLUDED (no explicit PQC).

title: СТБ 34.101.31-2020 — Информационные технологии и безопасность. Криптографические алгоритмы (Bel-T)
description: Belarusian national cryptographic standard (block cipher / Bel-T family) hosted by OAC. Classical, pre-quantum symmetric crypto standard; not post-quantum. EXCLUDED (no explicit PQC).

title: Рекомендации по обеспечению защиты общедоступной информации в информационных системах (OAC)
description: OAC recommendations for government agencies on protecting publicly available information in information systems. General information-security guidance; no explicit post-quantum cryptography reference. EXCLUDED (no explicit PQC).

title: Государственная программа «Цифровая Беларусь» на 2026–2030 годы
description: Ministry of Communications and Informatization page on the 'Digital Belarus' 2026-2030 state programme (approved by Council of Ministers, Dec 2025). Broad national digital-development programme; no evidence it explicitly names post-quantum/quantum-safe cryptography. EXCLUDED (no explicit PQC).

title: Информация о документе «Государственный стандарт Республики Беларусь СТБ 1962-2026»
description: Pravo.by registry entry for a recent Belarusian state standard (СТБ 1962-2026). No evidence the standard concerns post-quantum cryptography; surfaced via crypto-standard query. EXCLUDED (no explicit PQC; standard subject unconfirmed).

title: Постквантовая криптография и угрозы устаревших систем (ostrovets.by)
description: Local Belarusian news article explaining post-quantum cryptography and the quantum threat. Explicitly names PQC but is journalism, not an institutional issuer. EXCLUDED (non-institutional).

title: Белорусская криптография: от первых стандартов до межведомственного электронного документооборота (БелТА)
description: BelTA (state news agency) feature on the history of Belarusian cryptography and standards. Journalism; concerns classical STB crypto, not post-quantum. EXCLUDED (non-institutional / no explicit PQC).

title: Обзор законодательства Республики Беларусь — Криптография (digital.report)
description: Third-party overview of Belarusian cryptography legislation and OAC licensing/certification regime. Non-institutional secondary source; no explicit post-quantum cryptography. EXCLUDED (non-institutional / no explicit PQC).

title: О криптографической стандартизации в Республике Беларусь (BSU APMI)
description: Belarusian State University Institute of Applied Mathematics and Informatics page on Belarusian crypto standardisation (STB 34.101 series). Academic source; classical crypto, not post-quantum. EXCLUDED (academic / no explicit PQC).
